us_equities.prose: S&P 500 at 7,494, little changed on the session, down 0.2% on the week and up 0.3% on the month, closing higher for the 4th straight session. No clear catalyst flagged. Watch whether breadth confirms the move or it stays top-heavy.

rates_and_dollar.prose: 10-year Treasury at 4.43%, little changed on the session, down 5 bps on the week and down 14 bps on the month, inside its recent range. No clear catalyst flagged. The long end is the swing factor into the next data print.

commodities.prose: WTI crude at 75.80, higher about 1.4% on the session, down 1.3% on the week and down 22.3% on the month, closing higher for the 3rd straight session. No clear catalyst flagged. Watch the inventory and demand reads for the next leg.

crypto.prose: Bitcoin at 62,679, higher about 0.3% on the session, down 5.3% on the week and down 14.9% on the month, inside its recent range. No clear catalyst flagged. Risk appetite here tends to track the broader tape.

volatility_breadth.prose: VIX at 16.76, lower about 1.4% on the session, up 2.1% on the week and up 1.0% on the month, inside its recent range. No clear catalyst flagged. A low VIX leaves little hedging cushion if data surprises.
